basic_details.job_title: CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) Project Assistant II (PA-II) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR CSMCRI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II (PA-II) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per CSIR rules

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II (PA-II) Job 2026 Notification PDF

CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II (PA-II) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II (PA-II) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II (PA-II) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CSMCRI Project Assistant II (PA-II) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant II (PA-II) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in Chemistry to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant II (PA-II) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per CSIR rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant II (PA-II) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 20000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your bio-data and required documents to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant II (PA-II) post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial scrutiny of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to attach with my application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR CSMCRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CSMCRI is located in Bhavnagar, Gujarat, with the pincode 364002.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The job type is contractual, offering a specific tenure for the project.
